name: marp-slides
description: 技術LT用 Marp スライド集

scripts.build:html: for dir in $(find . -name 'slides.md' -not -path './_template/*' -exec dirname {} \;); do name=$(basename "$dir"); npx @marp-team/marp-cli "$dir/slides.md" --theme-set ./shared/theme.css --html --allow-local-files -o "docs/$name/index.html"; if [ -d "$dir/images" ]; then cp -R "$dir/images" "docs/$name/"; fi; done
scripts.build:pdf: mkdir -p dist && for dir in $(find . -name 'slides.md' -not -path './_template/*' -exec dirname {} \;); do name=$(basename "$dir"); npx @marp-team/marp-cli "$dir/slides.md" --theme-set ./shared/theme.css --html --allow-local-files --pdf -o "dist/$name.pdf"; done
